ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., RNA sequencing, microarray) */,
  "date_started" TEXT /* Date the experiment started */,
  "date_completed" TEXT /* Date the experiment completed */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "study_design" TEXT /* Study design (e.g., case-control, cohort) */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of samples in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the dataset belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., gene expression, transcriptome) */,
  "date_uploaded" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sequencing platform, microarray) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., FASTQ, SAM) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomics_data" (
  "genomics_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genomics data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the genomics data belongs to */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* ID of the gene */,
  "expression_level" REAL /* Expression level of the gene */,
  "p_value" REAL /* p-value of the gene */,
  "adjusted_p_value" REAL /* Adjusted p-value of the gene */,
  "log_fold_change" REAL /* Log fold change of the gene */,
  "standard_error" REAL /* Standard error of the gene */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval of the gene */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genomics_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomics_data_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomics_data_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome the gene is located on */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand the gene is located on (e.g., positive, negative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_annotations" (
  "gene_annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene annotation */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* ID of the gene the annotation belongs to */,
  "annotation" TEXT /* Annotation of the gene */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the annotation */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the annotation (e.g., GO term, KEGG pathway) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_annotation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "query_used" TEXT /* Query used to access the dataset (e.g., SQL query, API call) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "dataset_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "date_uploaded" TEXT /* Date when the version was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_tags" (
  "dataset_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset tag */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the tag belongs to */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_tags_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_categories" (
  "dataset_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset category */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the category belongs to */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_categories_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomics_data_types" (
  "genomics_data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genomics data type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the genomics data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genomics data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genomics_data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomics_data_formats" (
  "genomics_data_format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genomics data format */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the genomics data format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genomics data format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genomics_data_format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomics_data_analysis" (
  "genomics_data_analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genomics data analysis */,
  "genomics_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomics data the analysis belongs to */,
  "analysis" TEXT /* Analysis of the genomics data */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the analysis */,
  "algorithm_used" TEXT /* Algorithm used for the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genomics_data_analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomics_data_analysis_genomics_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("genomics_data_id") REFERENCES genomics_data ("genomics_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomics_data_quality_control" (
  "genomics_data_quality_control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genomics data quality control */,
  "genomics_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomics data the quality control belongs to */,
  "qc_results" TEXT /* Results of the quality control */,
  "qc_method" TEXT /* Method used for the quality control */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genomics_data_quality_control_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomics_data_quality_control_genomics_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("genomics_data_id") REFERENCES genomics_data ("genomics_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomics_data_validation" (
  "genomics_data_validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genomics data validation */,
  "genomics_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomics data the validation belongs to */,
  "validation_results" TEXT /* Results of the validation */,
  "validation_method" TEXT /* Method used for the validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genomics_data_validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomics_data_validation_genomics_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("genomics_data_id") REFERENCES genomics_data ("genomics_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomics_data_publications" (
  "genomics_data_publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genomics data publication */,
  "genomics_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomics data the publication is related to */,
  "pmid" INTEGER /* PubMed ID of the publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genomics_data_publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomics_data_publications_genomics_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("genomics_data_id") REFERENCES genomics_data ("genomics_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomics_data_funding" (
  "genomics_data_funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genomics data funding */,
  "genomics_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomics data the funding is related to */,
  "grant_id" TEXT /* Grant ID of the funding */,
  "agency" TEXT /* Agency providing the funding */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the funding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genomics_data_funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomics_data_funding_genomics_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("genomics_data_id") REFERENCES genomics_data ("genomics_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomics_data_collaborations" (
  "genomics_data_collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genomics data collaboration */,
  "genomics_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomics data the collaboration is related to */,
  "collaborator" TEXT /* Name of the collaborator */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the collaborator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genomics_data_collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomics_data_collaborations_genomics_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("genomics_data_id") REFERENCES genomics_data ("genomics_data_id")
)
